arts.ttl: The defender who is set to save Portsmouth hundreds of thousands in January transfer window
arts.sum: John Mousinho believes defender Connor Ogilvie is finally showing his Championship class.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth predicted XI and bench v Bristol City as one change made and defender recalled to squad
arts.sum: It was only three weeks ago when Pompey thrashed Bristol City 3-0 at Fratton Park.

arts.ttl: Every word Manning said on Luton win, 'embarrassing' Bristol City penalty call, Sykes and more
arts.sum: I thought we were really aggressive in duels, won numerous headers, managed the second balls really well and, yeah, I’m delighted we found a way, the lads deserve all the credit they get for today. He can play on the left and the right, and yeah I think with Ross and a lot of the other lads, having the depth, having the options, having the competition is so important especially when you have four games in 10 days.

A long-range strike from Scott Twine was all that separated the sides at full time on Boxing Day as Bristol City edged a 1-0 home win against a struggling Luton side. That victory ended a four-match...

arts.ttl: Defender hands Portsmouth injury boost ahead of Bristol City and Swansea games - with another 'close'
arts.sum: Jordan Williams has handed Pompey a welcome injury boost.

arts.ttl: Popular former Portsmouth figure handed non-league coaching role following Michael Doyle sacking
arts.sum: Fresh from sacking former Pompey skipper Michael Doyle as manager, non-league Woking have turned to another ex-Fratton Park figure to turn their fortunes around.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth's Championship rivals make brutal managerial sacking decision following Leeds defeat as relegation fears intensify
arts.sum: Pompey rivals Stoke City have sacked head coach Narcis Pelach after just three months in charge.

arts.ttl: LATEST: Portsmouth boss details extent of Matt Ritchie’s injury ahead of Bristol City and Swansea City
arts.sum: John Mousinho revealed Matt Ritchie will not be adding his name to Pompey’s injured list.

arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Championship clash between Bristol City and Portsmouth, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: ‘Our faithful deserve explanation’: What was said as Portsmouth boss faced officials over Watford penalty controversy
arts.sum: John Mousinho has detailed what was said as he faced officials and they acknowledged their key Watford error.
